Prediction: Yes

The current visit record indicates that the patient has been diagnosed with "Pure hypercholesterolemia." This is a specific lipid disorder that falls under the category of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism." Given that this diagnosis is explicitly mentioned, it is reasonable to predict that this condition will be coded again in the patient's next hospital visit, especially if there is ongoing management or monitoring of the lipid levels. The presence of this diagnosis provides strong evidence that a "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" diagnosis will be present in the future.
